zh.Oxnam, Roxburgh, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭洛包爾奧可南
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam於1163年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾德包時，他的父親Philip De Colvyle of Osnam32歲，母親Engelise Ingeram-1歲。他於大約1179年與Amabilis de Colville在蘇格蘭洛包爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.Oxnam, Roxburgh, Scotland: 英国苏格兰洛包爾奧可南
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam于1163年出生在苏格兰洛包爾德包时，他的父亲Philip De Colvyle of Osnam32岁，母亲Engelise Ingeram-1岁。他于大约1179年与Amabilis de Colville在苏格兰洛包爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1219年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Colville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Colleville in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the Scandinavian personal name Koli (see Cole 2) + Old French ville ‘settlement, village’. The Scottish branch of the family were descended from Philip de Colville, who came to Scotland as a household knight of kings Malcolm IV (1153–65) and William ‘the Lion’ (1165–1214).

variants.name: Cole
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English and Old French personal name Col(e), Coll(e), Coul(e), a pet form of Nicol (see Nichol and Nicholas ), a common personal name from the mid 13th century onward. English families with this name migrated to Scotland and to Ulster (especially Fermanagh).

English: occasionally perhaps from a different (early) Middle English personal name Col, of native English or Scandinavian origin. Old English Cola was originally a nickname from Old English col ‘coal’ in the sense ‘coal-black (of hair), swarthy’ and is the probable source of most of the examples in Domesday Book. In the northern and eastern counties of England settled by Vikings in the 10th and 11th centuries, alternative sources are Old Norse Kolr and Koli (either from a nickname ‘the swarthy one’ or a short form of names in Kol-), and Old Norse Kollr (from a nickname, perhaps ‘the bald one’).
English: nickname for someone with swarthy skin or black hair, from Middle English col, coul(e) ‘charcoal, coal’ (Old English col).

variants.name: Colvin
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal, Antrim): variant of   Colville  , probably reflecting a local pronunciation. The name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century.
Manx: if not identical with 1, perhaps from the Old Norse personal name Kolbeinn, with /v/ substituted for /b/.

English: from the rare Middle English personal name Colwin, Colvin, which may be a borrowing into English of a Welsh name whose modern form is Collwyn ‘white’, or of colwyn ‘doe, puppy, pet dog’, or of the placename Colwyn (Denbighshire, Radnorshire).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam was born in 1163, in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Philip De Colvyle of Osnam, was 32 and his mother, Engelise Ingeram, was -1. He married Amabilis de Colville about 1179, in Roxburghshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1219, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam est né en 1163, à Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Philip De Colvyle of Osnam, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Engelise Ingeram, avait -1 ans. Il a épousé Amabilis de Colville environ 1179, à Roxburghshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1219, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam 1163 in Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip De Colvyle of Osnam 32 und seine Mutter Engelise Ingeram -1. Er hat um 1179 in Roxburghshire, Scotland Amabilis de Colville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1219 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam è nato il nel 1163 nel Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Philip De Colvyle of Osnam, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Engelise Ingeram, aveva -1 anni. Lui sposato Amabilis de Colville circa 1179, nel Roxburghshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1219, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnamが1163年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアジェドブルグで生まれた時，父Philip De Colvyle of Osnamは32歳，母Engelise Ingeramは-1歳であった。約1179年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアでAmabilis de Colvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam(이)가 1163년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 제드버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip De Colvyle of Osnam(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Engelise Ingeram(은)는 -1세였다. 그는 대략 1179년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 Amabilis de Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam nasceu em 1163, em Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Philip De Colvyle of Osnam, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Engelise Ingeram, tinha -1 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabilis de Colville aproximadamente 1179, em Roxburghshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1219, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam родился в 1163 г. в местности джедбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Philip De Colvyle of Osnam было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Engelise Ingeram, -1. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabilis de Colville около 1179 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1219 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam nació en 1163, en Jedburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Philip De Colvyle of Osnam, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Engelise Ingeram, tenía -1 años. Se casó con Amabilis de Colville aproximadamente 1179, en Roxburghshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1219, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
